title: lamium album subsp. hyrcanicum
intro: Lamium album subsp. hyrcanicum, also known as White Spotted Lamium or Hyrcanian Lamium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb with white or pale purple flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lamium album subsp. hyrcanicum include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
